title: gtq-07-why-god-drowned-everybody

lossless_compression.reason: No live source file found for semantic addressing.

extracted_equations.text: S = accumulated entropy/sin debt blocking permanent Spirit-to-human bonding. Plain English: The Holy Spirit could not be permanently distributed before Pentecost not by divine preference but by structure. The Cross absorbs the blocking term. “It is finished” means the distribution channel is now clear. Coupling-Constant Asymmetry: Active vs. Passive

, inter-substrate coupling) that determines how the field acts on a subsystem. Distinct from the field itself: field = pervasive substrate; coupling = how interactions occur within it. Master Equation The framework's central expression: χ = ∫∫∫(G·M·E·S·T·K·R·Q·F·C) dx dy dt. The S term is what blocks permanent Spirit-distribution before the Cross. (Defined in detail in Article 04.) chi_local = G * M * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C
The framework's central expression: χ = ∫∫∫(G·M·E·S·T·K·R·Q·F·C) dx dy dt. The S term is what blocks permanent Spirit-distribution before the Cross. (Defined in detail in Article 04.)
